asset.title: Chat
asset.purpose: README live walkthrough clip. Judge whether the feature is obvious, visually consistent, and credible as evidence.

judge.summary: The walkthrough demonstrates the basic chat functionality within a NodeRoom, showing a user typing and sending a message in real time.

featureClarity.evidence: The chat input and message delivery are visible, though the clip is extremely brief.

workflowCompleteness.evidence: Shows the user typing a message and sending it, but lacks further interaction or agent response.

visualDesign.evidence: The dark mode UI is clean, but the abrupt zoom-in transition at the start is slightly distracting.

consistency.evidence: Aligns with the NodeRoom workspace layout containing files, users, and agents.

evidenceQuality.evidence: Captured directly from the working web application interface.

legibility.evidence: The text in the chat input and sidebar is readable, though some UI labels are small.

professionalRelevance.evidence: Demonstrates real-time collaboration, which is useful for team coordination.

productionHonesty.evidence: Accurately depicts simple message sending without overclaiming complex agent behaviors.

observedEvidence: Sidebar with files and live users

defects.observed: Abrupt zoom-in transition on the chat input area feels slightly disorienting.
defects.fix: Keep a steady viewport or use a smoother pan/zoom transition.

judge.suggestedReadmeCaption: Send real-time messages to coordinate with your team and agents inside NodeRoom.
